mapper.select: SELECT a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, b.bid_idx AS bidIdx, a.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, b.bidder_idx AS bidderIdx FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx JOIN bid_status bs ON b.bid_status_idx = bs.bid_status_idx LEFT JOIN review r ON b.bid_idx = r.bid_idx WHERE a.buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} AND bs.bid_status_code = 'won' AND r.bid_idx IS NULL ORDER BY b.bid_idx DESC

SELECT a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, b.bid_idx AS bidIdx, a.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, b.bidder_idx AS bidderIdx FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx JOIN bid_status bs ON b.bid_status_idx = bs.bid_status_idx LEFT JOIN review r ON b.bid_idx = r.bid_idx WHERE a.buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} AND bs.bid_status_code = 'won' AND r.bid_idx IS NULL
AND a.auction_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND i.item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( buyer_idx, bid_idx, auction_idx, bidder_idx, review_title, review_star, review_content, review_regdate ) SELECT a.buyer_idx, b.bid_idx, a.auction_idx, b.bidder_idx, #{reviewTitle}, #{reviewStar}, #{content}, NOW() FROM auction a JOIN bid b ON a.auction_idx = b.auction_idx WHERE b.bid_idx = #{bidIdx}
